title: OACP Proposal Payload (v1)
description: Payload schema for messages with payloadType = 'proposal-v1' (carried in PROPOSAL_EMITTED messages). The payload typically references a proposal artifact (proposalRef); the resolved artifact follows proposal.schema.json. This v1 payload schema is the message-level envelope payload, not the proposal artifact body itself. Per spec §13.3.

proposalId.description: Stable identifier of the proposal. MUST equal proposalRef.artifactId.

proposalRef.description: Reference to the proposal artifact. artifactType MUST be PROPOSAL. The resolved artifact body conforms to proposal.schema.json.

summary.description: Optional inline summary for receivers that need a quick view without resolving the artifact. Authoritative content is in the resolved proposal artifact.
